import json
OFFSET = 996.7  # approx clip start in original
with open\('d:/Claude Experiments/Test.json'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)
words = []
for seg in data['segments']:
    for w in seg['words']:
        if w['text'].strip\(\) and 1015 <= w['start'] <= 1065:
            words.append\(w\)

print\('Words around CUT START \(clip ~22s, original ~1019s\):'\)
for w in words[:30]:
    clip_t = w['start'] - OFFSET
    print\(f'  [{clip_t:.2f}s clip | {w[\\"start\\"]:.2f}s orig] {w[\\"text\\"]}'\)
print\(\)
print\('Words around CUT END \(clip ~58s, original ~1055s\):'\)
for w in words[-25:]:
    clip_t = w['start'] - OFFSET
    print\(f'  [{clip_t:.2f}s clip | {w[\\"start\\"]:.2f}s orig] {w[\\"text\\"]}'\)
")

import re, sys
from pdfminer.high_level import extract_text

pdf_dir = 'C:/Users/user/.claude/projects/C--Users-user-Timofey-Edit-AI/629c3aca-ef79-47f4-937b-9d84e42beb3a/tool-results/'

targets = [
    'webfetch-1774873728785-vesrb8.pdf',
    'webfetch-1774873729681-iob73k.pdf',
    'webfetch-1774873727726-px94g1.pdf',
]

for pdf in targets:
    print\(f'\\n====== {pdf} ======'\)
    try:
        text = extract_text\(pdf_dir + pdf\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'extract error: {e}'\)
        continue
    
    patterns = [r'\\bNate\\b', r'\\bFriedman\\b', r'right.?wing', r'right-wing']
    for p in patterns:
        for m in re.finditer\(p, text, re.IGNORECASE\):
            start = max\(0, m.start\(\)-300\)
            end = min\(len\(text\), m.end\(\)+300\)
            context = text[start:end].replace\('\\n', ' '\).encode\('ascii', errors='replace'\).decode\('ascii'\)
            print\(f'  MATCH [{p}]: ...{context}...'\)
            print\(\)
" 2>/dev/null)

import whisper, json
model = whisper.load_model\('base'\)
result = model.transcribe\(
    'G:/Shared drives/Scratch Disk/Timofey/Claude Code Experimentation/Test/Experiment.mp4',
    word_timestamps=True
\)
words = []
for seg in result['segments']:
    for w in seg.get\('words', []\):
        words.append\({'word': w['word'].strip\(\), 'start': round\(w['start'], 3\), 'end': round\(w['end'], 3\)}\)
out = {'text': result['text'].strip\(\), 'words': words}
with open\('D:/Claude Experiments/experiment_transcript.json', 'w'\) as f:
    json.dump\(out, f, indent=2\)
print\('Done. Text:', result['text'].strip\(\)\)
print\('Word count:', len\(words\)\)
")

Bash("C:/Users/user/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python311/python.exe" << 'EOF'
import urllib.request
import re
from urllib.parse import urlparse, parse_qs
from html.parser import HTMLParser
from html.entities import html2name, name2codepoint

# Try to import BeautifulSoup
try:
    from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
    print\("BeautifulSoup is available"\)
except ImportError:
    print\("BeautifulSoup not available, will parse manually"\)

# Fetch the HTML
url = "https://docs.google.com/document/d/1HCEXdYGMaUAbfazZVY7xduR8q8pVdWKBW5T-8aKh6PU/export?format=html"

try:
    headers = {'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'}
    req = urllib.request.Request\(url, headers=headers\)
    with urllib.request.urlopen\(req, timeout=10\) as response:
        html_content = response.read\(\).decode\('utf-8'\)
        
        # Parse with BeautifulSoup if available
        try:
            from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
            soup = BeautifulSoup\(html_content, 'html.parser'\)
            
            # Extract all links
            links = soup.find_all\('a'\)
            print\(f"\\nFound {len\(links\)} links"\)
            print\("\\n--- ALL LINKS ---"\)
            
            file_ids = set\(\)
            for link in links:
                href = link.get\('href', ''\)
                text = link.get_text\(\)
                print\(f"Text: '{text}' -> {href[:100]}"\)
                
                # Extract Drive file ID from Google redirect URLs
                if 'drive.google.com' in href:
                    match = re.search\(r'/d/\([a-zA-Z0-9_-]+\)', href\)
                    if match:
                        file_id = match.group\(1\)
                        file_ids.add\(file_id\)
                        print\(f"  Extracted FILE_ID: {file_id}"\)
            
            print\(f"\\n--- UNIQUE FILE IDs \({len\(file_ids\)}\) ---"\)
            for fid in sorted\(file_ids\):
                print\(f"  {fid}"\)
                
            # Extract body text
            print\("\\n--- FULL TEXT CONTENT ---"\)
            body = soup.find\('body'\)
            if body:
                text = body.get_text\(\)
                print\(text\)
        except ImportError:
            print\("BeautifulSoup not available"\)
            
except Exception as e:
    print\(f"ERROR: {type\(e\).__name__}: {e}"\)
    import traceback
    traceback.print_exc\(\)
EOF)

Bash("C:/Users/user/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python311/python.exe" << 'EOF'
import urllib.request
import re
from urllib.parse import urlparse, parse_qs

# Try to import BeautifulSoup
try:
    from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
    bs_available = True
except ImportError:
    bs_available = False
    print\("WARNING: BeautifulSoup not installed"\)

# Fetch the HTML
url = "https://docs.google.com/document/d/1HCEXdYGMaUAbfazZVY7xduR8q8pVdWKBW5T-8aKh6PU/export?format=html"

try:
    headers = {'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'}
    req = urllib.request.Request\(url, headers=headers\)
    with urllib.request.urlopen\(req, timeout=10\) as response:
        html_content = response.read\(\).decode\('utf-8'\)
        
        if bs_available:
            soup = BeautifulSoup\(html_content, 'html.parser'\)
            
            # Extract all links
            links = soup.find_all\('a'\)
            print\(f"Found {len\(links\)} links\\n"\)
            
            file_ids = set\(\)
            link_data = []
            
            for link in links:
                href = link.get\('href', ''\)
                text = link.get_text\(\).strip\(\)
                if text and href:
                    link_data.append\(\(text, href\)\)
                    print\(f"LINK: '{text}'"\)
                    print\(f"  URL: {href[:120]}"\)
                    
                    # Extract Drive file ID from Google redirect URLs
                    if 'drive.google.com' in href:
                        match = re.search\(r'/d/\([a-zA-Z0-9_-]+\)', href\)
                        if match:
                            file_id = match.group\(1\)
                            file_ids.add\(file_id\)
                            print\(f"  FILE_ID: {file_id}"\)
                    print\(\)
            
            print\(f"\\n{'='*60}"\)
            print\(f"UNIQUE FILE IDs \({len\(file_ids\)} total\)"\)
            print\(f"{'='*60}"\)
            for fid in sorted\(file_ids\):
                print\(f"  {fid}"\)
                
            # Extract body text
            print\(f"\\n{'='*60}"\)
            print\("FULL TEXT CONTENT"\)
            print\(f"{'='*60}\\n"\)
            body = soup.find\('body'\)
            if body:
                # Get all text with proper spacing
                paragraphs = body.find_all\(['p', 'h1', 'h2', 'h3', 'h4', 'h5', 'h6', 'li']\)
                for para in paragraphs:
                    text = para.get_text\(\).strip\(\)
                    if text:
                        print\(text\)
        else:
            print\("BeautifulSoup not available - using regex parsing"\)
            
except Exception as e:
    print\(f"ERROR: {type\(e\).__name__}: {e}"\)
    import traceback
    traceback.print_exc\(\)
EOF)
